question: Show me sales and return rate by brand. Include only brands with at least some returns.
gold_sql: SELECT s.brand_name, SUM(s.shipped_units) AS shipped_units, SUM(c.conceded_units) AS conceded_units, (SUM(c.conceded_units) * 100.0) / NULLIF(SUM(s.shipped_units), 0) AS return_rate_pct FROM shipped_raw s JOIN concession_raw c ON c.asin = s.asin AND c.mapped_year = s.year AND c.mapped_month = s.month AND c.mapped_week = s.week WHERE s.brand_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.brand_name HAVING SUM(s.shipped_units) > 0 ORDER BY return_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 10;
generated_sql:
WITH sales_by_brand AS (
  SELECT
    s.brand_name,
    SUM(s.shipped_units) AS shipped_units,
    SUM(s.product_gms)   AS product_gms
  FROM shipped_raw s
  GROUP BY 1
),
returns_by_brand AS (
  SELECT
    c.brand_name,
    SUM(c.conceded_units) AS conceded_units
  FROM concession_raw c
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  sb.brand_name,
  sb.shipped_units,
  sb.product_gms,
  rb.conceded_units,
  (rb.conceded_units * 100.0) / NULLIF(sb.shipped_units, 0) AS return_rate_pct
FROM sales_by_brand sb
JOIN returns_by_brand rb
  ON rb.brand_name = sb.brand_name
WHERE rb.conceded_units > 0
ORDER BY return_rate_pct DESC, rb.conceded_units DESC, sb.product_gms DESC;

question: Returns by return window: how many units returned within 15 days vs later?
gold_sql: SELECT return_window, SUM(conceded_units) AS total_units, SUM(ncrc) AS total_ncrc FROM concession_raw WHERE return_window IS NOT NULL GROUP BY return_window ORDER BY total_units DESC;
generated_sql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN return_window = '<=15' THEN '<=15 days'
    ELSE '>15 days'
  END AS return_window_bucket,
  SUM(conceded_units) AS returned_units
FROM concession_raw
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

question: Show me sales by average selling price bucket (asp_bucket).
gold_sql: SELECT asp_bucket, SUM(product_gms) AS total_sales, SUM(shipped_units) AS units FROM shipped_raw WHERE asp_bucket IS NOT NULL GROUP BY asp_bucket ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
generated_sql:
WITH sales_by_asp AS (
  SELECT
    c.asp_bucket,
    SUM(s.shipped_units) AS shipped_units,
    SUM(s.product_gms) AS product_gms,
    SUM(s.shipped_cogs) AS shipped_cogs,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(s.shipped_units) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE SUM(s.product_gms) / SUM(s.shipped_units)
    END AS avg_selling_price
  FROM shipped_raw s
  JOIN concession_raw c
    ON CAST(c.asin AS TEXT) = CAST(s.asin AS TEXT)
   AND c.mapped_year = s.year
   AND c.mapped_month = s.month
   AND c.mapped_week = s.week
  GROUP BY
    c.asp_bucket
)
SELECT
  asp_bucket,
  shipped_units,
  product_gms,
  shipped_cogs,
  avg_selling_price
FROM sales_by_asp
ORDER BY
  product_gms DESC;

question: How many products are flagged as high return rate (is_hrr_asin)?
gold_sql: SELECT is_hrr_asin, COUNT(DISTINCT asin) AS product_count, SUM(conceded_units) AS total_conceded FROM concession_raw WHERE is_hrr_asin IS NOT NULL GROUP BY is_hrr_asin;
generated_sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT CAST(asin AS TEXT)) AS hrr_flagged_products
FROM concession_raw
WHERE is_hrr_asin = 'Y';

question: Show me conceded units and NCRC by mapped year and mapped month (returns aligned to sales month).
gold_sql: SELECT mapped_year, mapped_month, SUM(conceded_units) AS conceded_units, SUM(ncrc) AS total_ncrc FROM concession_raw WHERE mapped_year IS NOT NULL AND mapped_month IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mapped_year, mapped_month ORDER BY mapped_year, mapped_month;
generated_sql:
SELECT
  c.mapped_year,
  c.mapped_month,
  SUM(c.conceded_units) AS conceded_units,
  SUM(c.ncrc) AS ncrc
FROM concession_raw c
GROUP BY
  c.mapped_year,
  c.mapped_month
ORDER BY
  c.mapped_year,
  c.mapped_month;
